rulings.Case Title: THEODORE KRYSINSKI et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Substitute Successor For Deceased Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion for an order to substitute Peter Krysinski as successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff, Theodore Krysinski, is granted. CCP 377.32(a)(5)(B) authorizes Peter Krysinski to act on behalf of Arlene Krysinski. The court is not ruling on whether the substitution of Peter renders the survival claim(s) time-barred. Any defendant is free to raise that issue once, by appropriate motion or at trial, once an order is signed permitting Peter to act on behalf of Arlene to pursue the survival claim(s). = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: WILEY UTTERBACK et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Aerojet-General Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment and alternative motion for summary adjudication is continued on the court¿s own motion to August 2, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220 to provide defendant an opportunity, if its wishes, to file supplemental reply papers responding to the supplemental opposition papers filed by plaintiffs on July 22. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Union Carbide Corporation¿s motion for summary judgment is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SAMUEL FRANKLIN II et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 583.310 Amd 583.360 Or Alternatively, A Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.410, 583.420 And 583.430
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Hanson Permanente Cement, Inc.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted per CCP 583.310 and 583.360. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant informs plaintiffs of this tentative ruling and they state that they do not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: SAMUEL FRANKLIN II et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JOINDER OF ADDITIONAL PARTIES
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Dowman Products, Inc.¿s joinder in Hanson Permanente Cement, Inc.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted per C.C.P. § 583.310 and 583.360. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant informs plaintiffs of this tentative ruling and they state that they do not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)
